2603.18637.title: MOSAIC: Multi-Objective Slice-Aware Iterative Curation for Alignment
2603.18637.paper_summary: We study how to allocate a fixed supervised fine-tuning budget when three objectives must be balanced at once: multi-turn safety alignment, low over-refusal on benign boundary queries, and instruction following under verifiable constraints. We propose MOSAIC (Multi-Objective Slice-Aware Iterative Curation for Alignment), a multi-objective framework for closed-loop data mixture search built on a unified L1-L3 evaluation interface. MOSAIC turns slice-level failure profiles into executable data actions, including dataset-level mixture ratios, bucket-level weights, and focus criteria. Under a fixed 1M-token budget and five rounds of independent fine-tuning from the same base model, MOSAIC improves internal XGuard from 2.76 to 4.67 while keeping OrBench at 4.41 and IFEval at 3.65. The final Pareto solution also generalizes better than a random static LoRA baseline on independent attack, over-refusal, and capability tests, suggesting that structured failure diagnosis can serve as a practical control signal for budgeted data construction. Code is available at https://github.com/douyipu/mosaic.
2603.18637.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究如何在三個目標必須同時平衡的情況下，分配固定的監督微調預算：多輪安全對齊、對良性邊界查詢的低拒絕率，以及在可驗證約束下的指令遵循。我們提出了MOSAIC（多目標切片感知迭代策劃對齊），這是一個基於統一的L1-L3評估介面的閉環數據混合搜索的多目標框架。MOSAIC將切片級失敗概況轉化為可執行的數據行動，包括數據集級混合比例、桶級權重和焦點標準。在固定的100萬標記預算和來自同一基模型的五輪獨立微調下，MOSAIC將內部XGuard的性能從2.76提升至4.67，同時保持OrBench在4.41和IFEval在3.65的水平。最終的Pareto解也在獨立攻擊、過度拒絕和能力測試中比隨機靜態LoRA基線有更好的泛化，這表明結構化的失敗診斷可以作為預算數據構建的實用控制信號。代碼可在https://github.com/douyipu/mosaic獲得。
2603.18637.author: Yipu Dou et.al.
